responses: Hello! Welcome to Akshaya Institute of Technology. How may I assist you today?
Akshaya Institute of Technology, Tumakuru, is a reputed engineering college with modern infrastructure, experienced faculty, and a focus on quality education and student development.
We offer Engineering programs in Computer Science, Information Science, Electronics and Communication, Civil, Mechanical, Artificial Intelligence and Data Science, and Agricultural Engineering.
The fee structure varies depending on the course and admission category. On average, it ranges between ₹50,000 and ₹1,50,000 per year.
Admissions are conducted through entrance exams such as KCET and COMEDK, or through management quota. You can apply online or visit the college for assistance.
The college operates from 9:00 AM to 4:30 PM. Timings may vary slightly depending on the department.

In the recent placement drive, Cloud Built (20 students), Rinex (13 students), Inner Circle (9 students), Edubricz (5 students), HLT Software (7 students), Tata Electronics (16 students), Bosch (5 students), Basant Technologies (23 students), and SMK Management (3 students) participated. Around 101 students were successfully placed.
The companies that visited our campus include Cloud Built, Rinex, Inner Circle, Edubricz, HLT Software, Tata Electronics, Bosch, Basant Technologies, and SMK Management.
The campus provides modern laboratories, smart classrooms, a well-equipped library, Wi-Fi, hostels, transportation, sports facilities, and a cafeteria.
The college has a well-stocked library with a wide range of books and digital resources for students.
Transportation facilities are available for students and staff, covering major locations.
You can contact the college through the official 0816-2294001 or admissions.akshaya@gmail.com .
The highest package offered is 5.5 LPA.
The lowest package offered is 2.4 LPA.
